author: David MacRitchie
title: Ancient and Modern Britons: A Retrospect (Volume I)
summary: MacRitchie's central work assembling heraldic, surname and municipal evidence for dark-complexioned populations in early Britain.

author: David MacRitchie
title: The Testimony of Tradition
summary: Euhemeristic reading of 'fairy hill' folklore as displaced memory of physical subterranean stone earth-houses.

author: David MacRitchie
title: Accounts of the Gypsies of India
summary: Comparative ethnographic mapping of nomadic lineages between India and the British Isles.

author: David MacRitchie
title: Fians, Fairies and Picts
host: Internet Archive (HTML + JPEG; convert locally for PDF)
summary: Archaeological review of underground earth-houses, drystone corbelled huts and the technology attributed to the historical Picts.
